result.summary: Found 3 issues: a major readability problem with legal text, a confusing UI element for navigation, and minor content clarity concerns.

issues.description: The terms and conditions text at the bottom of the yellow bonus section is extremely small and difficult to read, creating an accessibility barrier for users who need to review important legal information
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size of all legal/terms text to at least 12px. Consider adding a 'View Full Terms' link or expandable section for better readability and compliance with accessibility standards

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' indicator displays both up and down arrows (^ V), which is confusing since the instruction is only to scroll down. The upward arrow suggests bidirectional scrolling or an unclear action
issues.suggestion: Display only a single downward arrow or animated down arrow to clearly indicate the direction of scrolling. Remove the redundant upward arrow

issues.description: The promotional terms text beginning with 'Player may receive POKER offer...' appears to be cut off or truncated, making it incomplete and potentially confusing
issues.suggestion: Ensure all terms and conditions text is fully displayed and complete. If space is limited, use a scrollable container or link to full terms rather than truncating content
